coherence.title: Quantum Coherence
coherence.mechanism: Phase-locking of biophoton emissions across cellular boundaries.
coherence.function: Allows for lossless energy transfer and synchronized cellular signaling.

biophotons.title: Biophoton Emission
biophotons.concept: Biological light as a communication carrier.
biophotons.mechanism: The release of ultra-weak electromagnetic waves from living cells.
biophotons.function: Regulates intercellular metabolic processes and structural growth.

microtubules.title: Microtubules
microtubules.concept: Protein scaffolds as quantum computation sites.
microtubules.mechanism: Dipole oscillations within the tubulin lattice.
microtubules.function: Coordinates complex cellular behaviors and cytoskeletal transport.

bio-resonant-fields.title: Bio-Resonant Fields
bio-resonant-fields.mechanism: Self-organizing standing waves generated by cardiac and neural activity.
bio-resonant-fields.function: Maintains physiological homeostasis and energetic boundary integrity.

electromagnetic-induction.title: Electromagnetic Induction
electromagnetic-induction.concept: External field influence on internal circuitry.
electromagnetic-induction.mechanism: Variable magnetic flux creating electrical current in biological conductors.
electromagnetic-induction.function: Explains how environmental frequencies affect nervous system stability.

neural-nebula.title: Neural Nebula
neural-nebula.concept: The high-intensity luminescence of peak cognition.
neural-nebula.mechanism: Dense synaptic firing patterns creating localized field intensity.
neural-nebula.function: Serves as the primary energy interface for cognitive processing.
